## Identity

- **Email**: priyabrata.dutta369@gmail.com

---

## Professional Summary

Full Stack Developer with 15+ years of overall IT experience, including over 4.5+ years of specialized expertise in end-to-end scalable web application development using React, Node.js, Express, and AWS. Adept at designing scalable architectures, optimizing performance, and leading cross-functional teams to deliver efficient, secure, and user-focused digital solutions. Demonstrates strong problem-solving abilities, a passion for clean code, and a commitment to continuous learning in emerging technologies.

---

## Technical Skills

**Frontend**: React.js, Next.js, TypeScript, JavaScript, Tailwind CSS, Responsive Design, Mobile-First Design, Server-Side Rendering (SSR), Client-Side Rendering (CSR), Server-Side Generation (SSG), User Experience (UX), Front-End Performance

**Backend**: Node.js, Express, FastAPI (Beginner), REST APIs, JSON, API Integration, Authentication Implementation, Payment Integration, Error Handling, Loading States

**Database**: MySQL, Prisma ORM, Database Schema Design

**Cloud & DevOps**: AWS (EC2, S3, CloudFront, Lambda), Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD Automation Pipelines, Git, GitHub, Code Review

**AI / ML**: Generative AI, LLM (Beginner), AI Integration, AI Prompting

**Practices**: Clean Code, Performance Optimization, A/B Testing, Monitoring, Reliability, Scalability, Full Stack Development

---

## Management & Leadership Skills

Team Leadership, Complex Problem Solving, Client Communication, Project Management, Analytical Thinking, Adaptability, Collaboration, Time Management, Strategic Planning, Shipping / Delivery Focused, Accelerated Development Workflow, Technical & Non-Technical Communication, Impact-Driven Development, Systems Thinking, Business Acumen, Mentoring

---

## Experience

### 1. Technical Lead / Full Stack Developer — Appadd India (P) Ltd
- **Location**: Bangalore, India
- **Duration**: March 2022 – Present
- **Role**: Serving as both a Technical Lead and Full Stack Developer, leading end-to-end development of scalable web applications while mentoring a cross-functional team. Bridges technical execution with business objectives.

**Full Stack Development**:
- Implemented high-performance web applications using React.js, Next.js, Node.js, and Express
- Built RESTful APIs and integrated them with dynamic front-end interfaces
- Executed AWS-based deployments optimized for scalability, security, and uptime
- Applied CI/CD pipelines for automated testing, integration, and deployment
- Enhanced site speed via code optimization, lazy loading, and caching
- Delivered custom solutions across 100+ projects with responsive, cross-browser compatibility

**Team Leadership & Project Management**:
- Led a team of developers — task assignment, code review, best-practice enforcement
- Collaborated with stakeholders to define project scope, deliverables, and technical strategies
- Conducted code reviews and mentoring sessions to improve team efficiency
- Facilitated daily stand-ups and sprint planning in an Agile environment
- Coordinated with marketing and design teams for backend ↔ UI/UX integration
- Introduced process improvements that increased productivity and reduced bug rates
- Provided technical consultation to clients, translating requirements into actionable plans

### 2. Freelance Full Stack Developer — GraphicxIT
- **Location**: Siliguri, India
- **Duration**: 2020 – 2022
- **Role**: Collaborated with global clients to design and develop dynamic, high-performing web applications end-to-end — from requirements and architecture through deployment and optimization.

**Highlights**:
- Delivered 100+ custom websites and web applications using React.js, PHP, and Laravel
- Developed responsive, SEO-optimized interfaces using HTML5, CSS3, Tailwind, and JavaScript
- Improved database design and integration using MySQL with security and scalability
- Consulted clients on technology choices, digital strategy, and performance optimization
- Integrated CMS platforms — WordPress, Joomla, Drupal, Moodle — for custom needs
- Built automation workflows and marketing integrations using Zapier and custom APIs
- Applied analytics and tracking tools for client reporting and data-driven improvements
- Developed and deployed a full-featured Laravel-based web app for a private government body
- Provided continuous support, maintenance, and security upgrades

### 3. Technical Resource / Web Developer — Uttarbanga Sambad
- **Location**: Siliguri, India
- **Duration**: 2019 – 2020
- **Role**: Responsible for developing, managing, and maintaining the digital infrastructure of one of North Bengal's leading news media organizations. Combined full-stack development, digital operations, and team coordination.

**Highlights**:
- Developed and maintained a dynamic news portal with scalable architecture
- Led the digital transformation enabling real-time news publishing and media management
- Supervised a team of 20 with technical guidance and workflow automation
- Enforced web security to protect digital assets and ensure data integrity
- Oversaw server management and optimization, improving site performance and load times
- Managed Facebook Live programs — technical setup and live-stream integration
- Planned and executed digital marketing strategies aligned with audience growth and monetization
- Set up ad monetization and analytics platforms

### 4. Technical Assistant / Web Developer — Surendra Institute of Engineering & Management (SIEM)
- **Location**: Siliguri, India
- **Duration**: 2010 – 2019
- **Role**: Dual role — supporting academic programs as a Technical Assistant while leading digital and web development initiatives for the institution.

**Highlights**:
- Conducted programming lab sessions in C, C++, Java, VB.NET, and Data Structures & Algorithms
- Created, developed, and maintained the college website and digital marketing campaigns
- Led admission promotion strategy, increasing student enrolment via online and offline initiatives
- Designed print and digital assets — brochures, banners, event creatives
- Supervised and mentored final-year student projects in software design and implementation
- Directed technical workshops and seminars on emerging web technologies
- Implemented and expanded data management and security across labs and digital systems
- Coordinated with admissions and marketing to align technical activities with institutional goals
- Achieved a 10% increase in leads and a 6% rise in admissions via digital campaigns (2015–2016)

## Education

### Master of Computer Applications (MCA)
- **Institution**: Siliguri Institute of Technology, Siliguri
- **Year**: 2022
- **Focus**: Advanced software engineering, web technologies, cloud computing. Academic projects centered on full-stack development and system design.

### Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA)
- **Institution**: Sikkim Manipal University
- **Year**: 2011
- **Focus**: Programming foundations, database management, software development principles.
